---
name: 📝 Documentation improvement
about: Suggest improvements or add missing details to our guides.
title: "[DOCS] "
labels: documentation
assignees: ""
---

**Which document needs improvement?**
Please specify the file name (e.g., `README.md`, `DEPLOYMENT.md`, inline code comment, etc.)

**Describe the improvement**
A clear description of what needs to be added, corrected, or updated in the documentation.

**Proposed text / edits**
Provide the text edits or suggested replacements if possible.
